document_id: SUPLR 2012-0022 Sales of Medical Items and Instructional Materials

findings.evidence: In the PDF, the Governor and Secretary names are arranged in two side-by-side columns, and the date and ID numbers have specific center/right alignment. The HTML collapses all of these elements into a single left-aligned column.

findings.description: Footer and header text injected into main content stream.
findings.evidence: The footer information from PDF Page 1 (address, phone number) and the header from Page 2 are inserted directly into the reading flow in the HTML, appearing between an introductory paragraph and a bulleted list of medical devices.
The header text for PDF Page 3 ('Page 3 May 7, 2012...') is injected directly between list item 'a.' and list item 'b.' in the HTML output, disrupting the continuity of the list.
The signature block ('Administration Officer...') is positioned on the right side in the PDF but is left-aligned in the HTML.
